prompt: The between() result is negative when it should be positive. What is the bug?
choices: ChronoUnit.DAYS.between always returns a positive value
between(startInclusive, endExclusive) computes end - start; with start=June and end=January the result is negative (-152); swap the arguments to get the positive duration
LocalDate subtraction is not defined for dates in the same year
ChronoUnit.DAYS cannot be used with LocalDate; use Period.between instead
explanation: ChronoUnit.DAYS.between(a, b) returns b - a in days. With a=June 1 and b=January 1, b < a so the result is negative (-152 in a non-leap year). Fix: swap the arguments: ChronoUnit.DAYS.between(end, start) or Math.abs(...).
